title: Crockpot Tuscan Chicken (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Crockpot Tuscan Chicken is a slow-cooked, Italian-inspired dinner with parmesan, sun-dried tomatoes, and spinach. It is great for meal prep and for tracking macros in Eati.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Parmesan
- Sun-dried tomatoes
- Italian seasoning
- Spinach
- Cream (or lighter cream)
- Garlic (optional)
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Add chicken to the slow cooker with sun-dried tomatoes, seasonings, and any garlic.
2. Cook until chicken is tender and shreds easily.
3. Stir in parmesan and cream; simmer to thicken.
4. Add spinach and cook until wilted.
5. Serve and log your serving size in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 446 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 28g
Protein: 44g

Tip: choose a lighter cream option to reduce fat if needed.

conclusion: This crockpot recipe makes it easy to eat more protein with less day-to-day kitchen time. Track it in Eati for macro accuracy.
metaDescription: Crockpot Tuscan Chicken recipe with estimated calories, fat, and protein. Includes ingredients, instructions, and Eati tracking tips.
